findings.title: Body Application Guide Dimensional & Structural Verification
findings.exact_claim: The 2019 F-450 Regular Cab 4x2 Chassis Cab with 60 in CA features a 145.3-inch wheelbase; Body Application Guide / chassis literature address high-strength aluminum-alloy cab shell and fully-boxed high-strength steel front frame section at the platform literature level.
limitations: Page/token-anchor extraction NOT_EXECUTED — do not promote ASSERTION_VERIFIED from unread PDF.
Operator brochure SRC-002 NOT_ACQUIRED (URL 404) — not used as supporting hash.
Does not contain internal door cavity panel stamping thickness.
Wheelbase/CA values also locked in kernel CFG-000001 examples — BAG confirms hunt target, not geometry freeze.

findings.title: Door Panel Safety Recall Field Procedure & Fastener Identification
findings.exact_claim: F-Series aluminum doors utilize interior door handle release cables, water shields, and lock rod grommet configurations susceptible to water intrusion; reassembly guidance includes hand-tightening front door latch and window run retainers during preliminary positioning (recall service literature).
limitations: PLATFORM_FAMILY_REFERENCE — not EXACT_CONFIGURATION silo truth until 2019 Chassis Cab part-number cross-check.
Parse NOT_EXECUTED — latch/cable procedure text not token-anchored.
Requires exact harness clip location verification via EWD/WSM (SRC-CAND-000006 / 000002).
